headline: Oracle shares tumble 11% on increased capital raise, cash concerns
summary: Oracle beat on earnings and revenue, but negative free cash flow and the company's plan to raise more capital is weighing on the stock.

headline: KKR launches AI infrastructure company Helix with $10B+ in committed capital
summary: Adam Selipsky, Helix CEO and former AWS CEO, and Waldemar Szlezak, KKR’s global head of digital infrastructure, join 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss the launch of Helix Digital Infrastructure, the company's AI infrastructure buildout initiative, who the clients are, and more.

raw.headline: KKR launches AI infrastructure company Helix with $10B+ in committed capital
raw.summary: Adam Selipsky, Helix CEO and former AWS CEO, and Waldemar Szlezak, KKR’s global head of digital infrastructure, join 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss the launch of Helix Digital Infrastructure, the company's AI infrastructure buildout initiative, who the clients are, and more.

headline: Warren Wants Wall Street to Disclose Data on AI Firm Exposure
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Senator Elizabeth Warren introduced a bill requiring financial institutions to disclose their exposure to artificial intelligence companies, continuing her push for more scrutiny on the sector’s funding. headline: Private credit has ‘growing pains,’ but a Man Group exec sees opportunities in higher rates
summary: Private credit is facing liquidity-related “growing pains,” but higher-for-longer interest rates could create attractive yield opportunities, Man Group said.

raw.headline: Private credit has ‘growing pains,’ but a Man Group exec sees opportunities in higher rates

headline: Apollo & Blackstone Inc. (BX) Seal $35B Anthropic AI Deal
summary: Blackstone Inc. (NYSE:BX) is a deep value stock to invest in now. On June 6, 2026, Apollo Global Management (NYSE:APO) and Blackstone (NYSE:BX) finalized a $35 billion financing package for Anthropic, according to Bloomberg. The deal is one of the largest private credit transactions on record and will fund Google’s custom TPUs, leased by Anthropic […]
